policy.official_first: ASXListedCompanies.csv, ASX investment-products workbook, and ASX ISIN.xls probe context are review evidence, but only direct valid identifiers may be applied.
policy.no_guessing: No ASX ISIN or ETF category is inferred from ticker, name shape, issuer family, or peer instruments.
policy.scope_first: Core-exclusion candidates remain blank until scope is explicitly reviewed.

asx_residual_backlog.source_gate: ASX residual work remains blocked unless exact ASX workbook, registry, issuer, trustee, prospectus, or reviewed product-taxonomy evidence proves the value; no ticker/name or peer-instrument inference.

top_asx_resolution_review_batches.recommended_next_source: asx_listed_companies plus reviewed scope decision for core, extended, or exclude before identifier work.
top_asx_resolution_review_batches.source_gate: No ISIN or category enrichment until the listing is reviewed as core, extended, or excluded.

top_asx_resolution_review_batches.recommended_next_source: Current ASX ISIN workbook, registry, issuer, trustee, or prospectus source with exact listing match.
top_asx_resolution_review_batches.source_gate: Keep ISIN blank until current ASX, registry, issuer, or trustee evidence proves the identifier.

top_asx_resolution_review_batches.recommended_next_source: Official ASX product taxonomy, issuer/sponsor product page, PDS, or reviewed product taxonomy source.

top_asx_resolution_review_batches.recommended_next_source: Manual exact-name or reviewed-alias resolution against ASX workbook, issuer, or registry evidence.
top_asx_resolution_review_batches.source_gate: Do not apply workbook ISIN until the name mismatch is manually resolved with exact listing evidence.
